source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race in pause ddl test
source_pr.body:

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #44417 

Problem Summary:
add lock to protect isPaused in ddl test.

### What is changed and how it works?

symptoms: ddl: fix data race in pause ddl test
failure_signature: ddl: fix data race in pause ddl test
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to a concurrency data race in the pause DDL test. This PR stabilizes it by adding synchronization (e.g., a mutex) to protect shared state accessed from concurrent goroutines in the test.
fix_pattern: Protect shared test state with a mutex to avoid data races in pause DDL tests.

evidence: evidence: ddl: fix data race in pause ddl test
